name: ref::if_alternate::watch_effect_function::named
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = ref(true); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(function () { if (guard.value) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });

name: ref::if_alternate::watch_effect_function::namespace
source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.ref(true); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(function () { if (guard.value) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });

name: ref::logical_rhs::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = ref(true); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { guard.value && payload.value; });

name: ref::logical_rhs::watch_effect_arrow::namespace
source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.ref(true); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(() => { guard.value && payload.value; });

name: ref::logical_rhs::watch_effect_function::named
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = ref(true); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(function () { guard.value && payload.value; });

name: ref::logical_rhs::watch_effect_function::namespace
source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.ref(true); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(function () { guard.value && payload.value; });

name: ref::ternary_branch::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = ref(true); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { guard.value ? payload.value : sink(); });

name: ref::ternary_branch::watch_effect_arrow::namespace
source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.ref(true); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(() => { guard.value ? payload.value : sink(); });

source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.ref(true); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(function () { guard.value ? payload.value : sink(); });
